# third-party/

| Service | Lang | Port |
|---|---|---|
| repair-network    | Java | 50260 |
| medical-provider  | Java | 50261 |
| legal-service     | Java | 50262 |
| tpa-gateway       | Java | 50263 |
| data-vendor       | Java | 50264 |
